name: Job Search Pipeline — Score & Route

nodes.name: Fetch Job Feed (Placeholder)
nodes.notes: Replace URL with actual career page RSS/JSON feeds. Add multiple HTTP Request nodes for each target company. Compare against seen_jobs table to avoid duplicates.

parameters.body:
={{ '🔥 Score: ' + $json.score + '/100

' + $json.summary + '

Strengths: ' + $json.strengths.join(', ') + '

Breakdown:
• ASC 740: ' + ($json.breakdown.asc740 || 0) + '/25
• Team: ' + ($json.breakdown.team_leadership || 0) + '/15
• M&A: ' + ($json.breakdown.ma_transaction || 0) + '/15
• Tech: ' + ($json.breakdown.technology || 0) + '/10
• Location: ' + ($json.breakdown.location || 0) + '/10
• Seniority: ' + ($json.breakdown.seniority || 0) + '/15
• Stability: ' + ($json.breakdown.stability || 0) + '/10

' + $json.company + ' — ' + $json.location }}

nodes.name: Things 3 — Apply Task
nodes.notes: Generates Things 3 URL scheme JSON. To execute on macOS, use an Execute Command node with: open "$thingsUrl" — or trigger via Alfred webhook.

nodes.name: Things 3 — Review Task
nodes.notes: Creates a Things 3 'Review' task with 7-day deadline for maybe-score jobs.

parameters.responseBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  status: 'scored',
  title: $('Parse Score Result').item.json.title,
  company: $('Parse Score Result').item.json.company,
  score: $('Parse Score Result').item.json.score,
  recommendation: $('Parse Score Result').item.json.recommendation,
  breakdown: $('Parse Score Result').item.json.breakdown,
  strengths: $('Parse Score Result').item.json.strengths,
  concerns: $('Parse Score Result').item.json.concerns,
  summary: $('Parse Score Result').item.json.summary
}) }}

notes:
## Job Search Pipeline (S6)

### How to use

**Webhook mode (primary):**
```bash
curl -X POST http://<n8n-host>/webhook/job-score \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "title": "Senior Tax Manager - ASC 740",
    "company": "Deloitte",
    "description": "Lead ASC 740 provision team of 8...",
    "location": "Houston, TX (Hybrid)",
    "url": "https://careers.deloitte.com/..."
  }'
```

**Schedule mode:** Enable the 'Fetch Job Feed' and 'Normalize Scheduled Input' nodes, configure career page URLs.

### Routing
- Score > 80: ntfy high-priority + Things 3 'Apply' task (3-day deadline, checklist)
- Score 60-80: ntfy default + Things 3 'Review' task (7-day deadline)
- Score < 60: Log only

### Credentials needed
- `LiteLLM Gateway Token`: HTTP Header Auth with Bearer token for the gateway at localhost:4000

### ntfy
- Topic: jobs @ http://192.168.1.38:8090
- High priority notifications include score breakdown and click-to-open action

### Things 3
- Tasks created in 'Career' area with job-search tag
- High-priority tasks include application checklist
- Score decade tag (score-80, score-70, etc.) for filtering
